meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Freelancers: Beat Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Master advanced project management workflows to eliminate slow dev speed. A high-impact guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, shift from manual coding to an intent-based architecture. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you convert hours of boilerplate into seconds of precision. Treat your project as a managed state machine, allowing AI to handle the heavy lifting of implementation.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is refreshing their email, and your IDE is a graveyard of half-finished features. Slow development isn't just a technical bottleneck; it is a profit-killer that keeps you trapped in the 'forever-freelancer' cycle. You aren't paid to type; you are paid to ship.

True velocity requires a paradigm shift. By leveraging AI-native project management, you decouple your thinking from your keystrokes. We are moving beyond simple prompts into a robust, orchestrated workflow where your intent dictates the architecture and the machine executes with surgical precision.

steps.title: Define the Source of Truth
steps.description: Establish a rigid project schema so AI understands your constraints before a single line of code is written.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for this SaaS module and generate a strict technical specification, including database schema, API endpoints, and dependency constraints.

steps.title: Scaffold with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to build the boilerplate structure, ensuring folder hierarchy and type safety are enforced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready folder structure using the previously created spec, ensuring all middleware and error handling patterns are included.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break complex features into atomic tasks to prevent hallucinations and maintain high code quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break the primary feature into 3 atomic tasks. For each task, define the input/output and required unit tests.

steps.title: Automated Code Review Loops
steps.description: Force Claude Code to audit its own output against your project-wide style guide and security standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last generated module for security vulnerabilities and adherence to the project style guide. Provide refactoring suggestions.

steps.title: Final Integration and Sync
steps.description: Sync the local codebase with the remote repository, ensuring all documentation is updated automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise README update and commit message based on the changes implemented in the current session.

pro_tips: Always define a 'Negative Constraint' prompt in Antigravity to prevent the AI from importing unnecessary third-party libraries.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your client's preferred UI component library, so you never have to specify it twice.
Run unit tests inside the Claude Code terminal immediately after every 'apply' command to catch regressions before they compound.
Treat your project documentation as code—if it isn't in the spec file, the AI should be instructed to ignore it during generation.
Use 'context-window-pruning' in your Claude config to keep the AI focused on the current module rather than the entire history.
content.next_steps: Configure your local environment with a custom .claude-ignore file to optimize token usage and start migrating your existing client projects into the new workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your IDE and start engineering your future. You have the tools to ship in half the time; now you just need the discipline to automate the boring stuff. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
